with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
    articles = json.load(f)

def classify_article(title, desc):
    text = (title + " " + desc).lower()
    
    strong_tech = "gameboy xbox playstation nintendo wii ipod iphone ipad macbook linux firefox mozilla browser spam spyware malware virus hacker nasa space shuttle mars venus jupiter saturn galaxy universe astronomy physics biologist genetic genome stem cell cloning robot artificial intelligence nanotech".split()
    
    # Check multi-word strong tech manually or via partial match
    if any(x in text for x in strong_tech):
        return "Science/Technology"
    
    if "science" in title.lower() or "technology" in title.lower():
        return "Science/Technology"
        
    scores = {'Science/Technology': 0, 'Business': 0, 'Sports': 0, 'World': 0}
    
    st_s = "science technology tech computer software hardware internet web online digital mobile phone game gaming video console microsoft apple google intel amd ibm sony biology chemistry research study lab scientist engineer innovation gadget device "
    st_s += "electronic telecom wireless satellite rocket solar energy chip server database program code app"
    st_kw = st_s.split()
    
    biz_s = "business economy market stock share profit loss revenue sale deal merger acquisition company corp inc firm bank financial invest trade budget tax ceo cfo price cost inflation rate dollar euro oil gold earning sales wall street dow nasdaq fed gdp contract bid offer"
    biz_kw = biz_s.split()
    
    sp_s = "sport football soccer basketball baseball tennis golf cricket rugby hockey racing olympic medal athlete player coach match game tournament championship league cup bowl playoff final win won winner loss lost defeat beat score goal touchdown basket point club season injury nfl nba mlb nhl fifa uefa wimbledon open "
    sp_s += "broncos yankees mets dodgers giants cornerback quarterback receiver pitcher inning"
    sp_kw = sp_s.split()
    
    wo_s = "world politics government president minister election vote war peace military army police court law crime attack bomb terror disaster quake flood storm country nation international treaty un eu nato iraq iran china usa uk russia afghanistan israel palestine syria diplomacy foreign policy parliament congress senate democrat republican official troop force weapon nuclear settlement gaza killed dead blast explosion crash"
    wo_kw = wo_s.split()

    for w in text.split():
        w = w.strip('.,;:"\'?!()[]{}')
        if w in st_kw: scores['Science/Technology'] += 1
        if w in biz_kw: scores['Business'] += 1
        if w in sp_kw: scores['Sports'] += 1
        if w in wo_kw: scores['World'] += 1
        
    if "game" in text:
        if any(x in text for x in ["video game", "console", "nintendo", "sony", "microsoft"]):
             scores['Science/Technology'] += 3
        elif any(x in text for x in ["football", "soccer", "baseball", "basketball", "stadium", "field", "ball"]):
             scores['Sports'] += 3
    
    best_cat = max(scores, key=scores.get)
    
    if scores['Science/Technology'] == scores['Business'] and scores['Science/Technology'] > 0:
        if any(x in text for x in ["stock", "market", "revenue", "profit", "earning", "share"]):
            return "Business"
        else:
            return "Science/Technology"
            
    if scores['Science/Technology'] == scores['Sports'] and scores['Science/Technology'] > 0:
        if "game" in text and "video" not in text:
            return "Sports"
            
    return best_cat

sci_tech_count = 0
total = len(articles)
results = []

for art in articles:
    cat = classify_article(art['title'], art['description'])
    if cat == 'Science/Technology':
        sci_tech_count += 1
    results.append({'title': art['title'], 'category': cat})

fraction = sci_tech_count / total if total > 0 else 0

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps({"sci_tech_count": sci_tech_count, "total": total, "fraction": fraction, "examples": results[:20]}))
